name: ljg-paper
description: Academic paper deep reader with atom pipeline

metadata.description: Takes an academic paper (URL, PDF, or file), runs the atom pipeline (split, squeeze, plain, feynman, napkin sketch, advisor review), and synthesizes a fluent analysis. Focus: what gap does it fill, and would a seasoned advisor take it seriously?

plugins.name: ljg-paper
plugins.description: Deep-read academic papers through a structured cognitive pipeline, outputting Org-mode analysis files.
